title: Grep Analysis
description: Log filtering with grep and pattern-based triage.

mission.txt.content:
[LEVEL 4] GREP MASTER — MEDIUM
───────────────────────────────

Objective: A FLAG is hidden inside access.log. Use grep to surface the matching line.

Hint: grep "FLAG" access.log
Hint: grep -n "FLAG" access.log (with line number)
When the matching line is rendered, the flag appears in the terminal.

access.log.content:
192.168.1.1 - GET /index.html 200
10.0.0.5 - POST /login 401 "invalid credentials"
45.33.32.156 - GET /admin FLAG{gr3p_1s_p0w3r} 403
172.16.0.1 - GET /robots.txt 200
10.0.0.99 - GET /.env 404
192.168.1.100 - POST /api/users 500
